---
title: "KNN searches for single cell"
date: last-modified
date-format: yyyy-MM-dd
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{KNN searches for single cell}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    collapse: true
    comment: '#>'
author: 
  - name: "Gregor Lueg"
---
